landing.hero_subtitle: Create your professional CV in minutes. Designed to pass HR AI filters and land the interview.
landing.hero_cta_sub: Free. No registration. Ready to download.
landing.ats_highlight_title: The only template that guarantees maximum ATS compatibility
landing.ats_highlight_desc: Built following the official guidelines of LinkedIn, Indeed, Workday and SAP SuccessFactors. One column, universal typography, no tables or images. Exactly what algorithms want to read.
landing.ats_title: Why do our CVs pass ATS filters?
landing.ats_subtitle: 75% of CVs are rejected by automated systems before a human ever sees them.
landing.ats_1_desc: ATS systems read plain text. Our templates avoid complex tables, multiple columns and images that confuse the algorithms.
landing.ats_2_desc: Keywords must be in specific sections. Our RECOMMENDED template places information exactly where recruiters look for it.
landing.ats_3_desc: Non-standard fonts, unusual colors and exotic formats prevent ATS from reading your CV. We use universal fonts every system recognizes.
landing.ats_4_desc: Experience → Education → Skills. That's the order 90% of global ATS expect. Our RECOMMENDED follows it exactly.
landing.guide_recommended_desc: For large corporations, multinationals, startups with formal hiring processes, LinkedIn Easy Apply.
landing.guide_moderno_desc: For tech companies, young startups, product and UX design roles where looks matter.
landing.guide_minimalista_desc: For tech, engineering, data science. Let your achievements speak without distractions.
landing.guide_creativo_desc: For graphic design, marketing, advertising, social media. Show your personality.
landing.guide_ejecutivo_desc: For senior roles, directors, C-level. Communicate authority and track record.
landing.cta_title: Ready for the CV that will change your life?

templates.title: Choose your template
templates.subtitle: Each template was designed for a specific type of application.
templates.recommended_desc: ATS-optimized. Single-column structure, standard typography, no images. Maximum chances of passing automated filters.
templates.moderno_desc: Sidebar with contact details and skills. Visually appealing design for tech companies.
templates.minimalista_desc: All space goes to content. Clean typography, generous margins. When less is more.
templates.creativo_desc: Two columns with color accent. Icons and badges. For creative and marketing roles.
templates.ejecutivo_desc: Imposing header, clear hierarchy. For senior, director and C-level positions.

form.name: Full name
form.summary_hint: 3-5 lines. Describe your professional profile with your industry keywords.
form.bullet_hint: One achievement per line. Use action verbs and numbers when possible.
form.skills_hint: Comma or Enter separated. E.g.: React, Node.js, SQL
form.interests_hint: Comma separated. E.g.: Photography, Running, Open Source
form.clear_confirm: Clear all form data? This cannot be undone.

errors.pdf_error: Error generating PDF. Please try again.
